description_long: This is a compact, two-story urban massage shop with a weathered, off-white exterior and a flat, slightly raised roof rimmed with a pale trim. The front facade features a teal door, a small window with a metal awning, and a green vertical sign with white floral patterns, as well as various posters and graffiti, giving it a gritty, lived-in appearance. The upper story has a shuttered window with Japanese text and a protruding vent pipe, while the side and rear walls are mostly plain, with visible grime and some exposed piping. The roof is equipped with two large metal HVAC units and several pipes, suggesting functional ventilation and utility infrastructure. The building's surfaces are rough and matte, with visible signs of age and urban wear, and the signage and window details evoke a distinctly Japanese urban streetscape. The overall structure is boxy and utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements aside from the signage and a few architectural flourishes.
description: A small, weathered Japanese urban massage shop with a teal door, green floral sign, rooftop HVAC units, and gritty exterior details.
description_view_0: Shows the plain side of the building with the flat roof, rimmed trim, and two rooftop HVAC units visible.
description_view_1: Displays the side with exposed piping running vertically and horizontally, and a clear view of the HVAC units and vent pipes on the roof.
description_view_2: Front view with the teal entrance door, signage, window with awning, graffiti, and the most detailed street-facing features.
description_view_3: Rear view with a mostly blank wall, a green floral sign protruding from the side, and visible rooftop piping and vent.
attribute_signage: A vertical green sign with white floral patterns is mounted on the left side of the building, and a shuttered window on the upper front displays Japanese text. Additional posters and graffiti are present on the lower front wall. All signage appears to be painted or printed on metal or wood, with no visible illumination.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is a single teal metal door with a small rectangular window, set into a slightly recessed frame. The door is flanked by posters and graffiti, and topped by a small metal awning. No visible accessibility features or decorative elements beyond the signage.
attribute_architectural_style: Traditional Japanese urban with utilitarian influences, featuring simple boxy geometry, minimal ornamentation, and practical rooftop infrastructure.
